summary: Pause Dependabot version-update PR generation while dependency maintenance is handled manually.
rationale: The repository is clearing an accumulated Dependabot backlog and should not immediately recreate dependency PR branches. Setting active ecosystems to open-pull-requests-limit=0 keeps maintenance explicit until a controlled update PR is planned.
verification: uv run ruff check tools/check_pr_governance.py tests/test_pr_governance.py
uv run ty check tools/check_pr_governance.py tests/test_pr_governance.py
risks: Dependency updates will need to be handled by an explicit maintenance PR while Dependabot PR generation is paused.
